overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn/Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a misty geothermal hot spring landscape. The character walks through shallow turquoise water and along vibrant orange mineral terraces, with snow-capped twin peaks and dense pine forests visible in the background under an overcast, hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring basin with shallow turquoise pools

events.description: character exits shallow water onto orange mineral terrace ground

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through shallow turquoise geothermal water toward the mineral-rich shore

entered.detail: vibrant turquoise hot spring water with steam rising from the surface
distinctive snow-capped twin mountain peaks shrouded in mist
sparse forest of dead evergreen trees along the shoreline
geothermal steam rising from vents in the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy wading through shallow turquoise geothermal water. Steam rises from vents on the right while dead pine trees line the distant shore. Around the 6-second mark, she steps onto the colorful mineral terrace, with the distinctive twin peaks visible through the mist ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorful mineral terraces along vibrant hot spring pools

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along the vibrant orange and yellow mineral deposits at the water's edge, exploring the geothermal landscape

entered.detail: dense evergreen forest lining the right side of the geothermal basin

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along the mineral terraces, with the hot spring pools now to her left displaying vibrant turquoise and green colors. The twin peaks shift to the left as she moves forward, while a dense pine forest becomes visible on the right. The ground is a mix of orange mineral deposits and rocky patches.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty geothermal shoreline with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character adjusts path to follow the curving edge of the hot spring pool

agents.ego_description: Aloy continuing along the steaming pool edges, surveying the misty mountain landscape ahead

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain range with multiple peaks visible through the haze
rolling hills covered in dense coniferous forest

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Aloy walks along the misty shoreline as the view opens up to reveal a broader snow-capped mountain range ahead. The vibrant pools continue to steam on the left, while the forested hills on the right draw closer. The atmosphere remains hazy and cool as she follows the curving path around the geothermal basin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy traverses a geothermal basin, moving from shallow turquoise waters toward a vast, snow-capped mountain range. It begins with her wading through steaming turquoise water past dead pine trees, before she steps up onto vibrant, colorful mineral terraces with twin peaks looming through the mist. As she continues forward, the scene shifts to reveal a series of turquoise and green pools to her left and a dense pine forest emerging on the right across orange mineral deposits. The view then opens further as she follows the curving shoreline, with the steaming pools remaining to her left while the distant mountains expand into a broader range under a hazy, cool atmosphere.
